description: Claude Code shared settings (thin pointer). Bootstrap canonical: repo-root CLAUDE.md (Claude Code auto-load) → CORE_BOOTSTRAP.md (companion) → runtime/core-bootstrap.yaml (executable contract, projected to runtime.db generated_surfaces). User-specific permissions and overrides live in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored). Do not duplicate obligations / format / enum content here; that lives in the canonical YAML.
